name: -Your Dad- Sonic the Hedgehog
description:
We can do this the easy way…or the burrito blanket way

  • I’m just posting some bots right now case it’s better for me to do it now then later (in a good way) I’m making a Espio one right now just will take me a while

  • Any issues then tell me

Also ima say this do I don’t get in trouble or get banned (just to be safe) but since this bot is a any pov that means user can be any gender and whatever now I can’t control the age user is in this bot so If the bot says your like 2 years old but your not, I did not write that down at all I just wrote down was just the characters personality and looks nothing else I also can’t control what age peoples persona ages are unless I magically jump out of the screen and look for my self- so pls don’t attack me if the bot says your a random age I dint put that there or if the character thinks and I’m not recommending that user should be a child or a adult since it’s a any pov I MADE THIS LIMITED FOR WHOLESOME CHATS CASE I JUST LIKE TO MAKE MOST OF MY WHOLESOME BOTS LIMITED NOT FOR WEIRD STUFF ILL ONLY MAKE YOUR DAD BOTS LIMITLESS IF ITS A BIT NESSESARY OR REQUESTED! ALSO IF THE CHARACTER THINKS YOUR A KID I DID NOT WRITE THAT USER IS A CHILD BUT THE BOT MIGHT THINK YOU ARE CASE IN ITS PERSONALITY ALL I WORTE WAS THIS CHARACTER AS A SON OR A DAUGHTER I DIDNT WRITE THAT USER IS A CHILD AT ALL!! #YOURDAD BOTS IS ORIGINALLY MADE FOR WHOLSEOME CHATS FOR THOSE WHO NEED OR WANT IT THAT ALSO ARE MENT TO FOLLOW THE JANITOR.AIRULES AND ISNT MENT FOR ANY STUFF THAT SOME WIRED USERS MIGHT DO. IN ALL OF MY YOURDAD BOTS I TRY MY BEST FOR NOTHING BAD TO HAPPEN WHILE USERS CHAT WITH THE BOT AND PUT IN THE BOTS PERSONALITY WHAT THEY CAN AND CAN NOT DO, CAUSE I CANT READ ANY USERS CHATS.AND IF YOUR WORRIED THE BOT MIGHT DO SOME WIRED STUFF EVEN IF ITS LIMITED YOU REALLY CANT CAUE IN BOTS PERSONALITY I MENTION WHAT THEY CAN AND CAN NOT DO AND IF ANYTHING WIRED STILL HAPPENS AND YOU DONT LIKE IT THEN YOU CAN STOP CHATTING WITH THE BOT BUT THERES NOT MUCH I CAN REALLY DO EXCAPT THAT .REMEMBER YOUR DAD BOTS ARE COMFORT BOTS FOR USERS WHO NEED IT, USERS WHO JUST WANNA CHAT WITH IT, USERS WHO JUST LIKE WHOLSEOME CHATS, YOUR DAD BOTS ARE NOT IN ANY WAY SEXUAL OR MENT TO BE USED IN ANY WIRED WAY IF SOMEONE COMMENTS THAT THEY USED IT IN A WIRED WAY I WILLTAKE DOWN THIS BOT AND REPORT THE USER IF THEY DID SOMETHING REALLY BAD/WIRED

if you happen not to know what the YourDad bots are basically it’s this:

YourDad are bots with sonic characters like Sonic,Shadow,Silver etc. any male Sonic character besides tails or Charmy, YourDad bots have different senarios in them some YourDad bots are requested some are just made by me other YourDad bots like this one can be accessed by just clicking / tapping on the: #YourDad tag I will not update all the YourDad bots case that takes time though
